publishedAbstract: Attempting to resize a PVC is not working, getting below errors: ~~~ expand_controller.go:292] Ignoring the PVC "gtx-XXX-XXX-prd/data-mariadb-0" (uid: "-XXXX-XXXX-XXXX-XXXXXXXXXXXX"): didn't find a plugin capable of expanding the volume; waiting for an external controller to process this PVC. ~~~ ~~~ 2023-02-05T21:29:22.490558057Z E0205 21:29:22.490417 1 utils.go:200] ID: 526585 Req-ID: 0001-0011-openshift-storage--XXXXXX-XX-XX-XX-XX GRPC error: rpc error: code = InvalidArgument desc = provided secret is empty ~~~
publishedTitle: Provided secret is empty GRPC Error raised when attempting resize PVC
